title: lappula occultata
intro: Lappula occultata, also known as the hidden blue pritlove or hidden blue pincushion, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lappula occultata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
